hero.title: What is this platform?
hero.description: Changemappers is an ecosystem where, as a visionary, creator, organizer, or activist, you can connect with causes, communities, and knowledge that serve the regenerative transformation of the world.

stories.title: Stories
stories.description: Read open stories about breakthroughs, failures and what collaborative work actually taught people.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.description: See where we're heading and what milestones we've set for the future.

governance.title: Governance
governance.description: Read the charter, refusal register, challenge path, and other platform accountability commitments.

mainSite.title: Changemappers.org
mainSite.description: Visit our main site where we present our core vision and methodology.

moreAbout.sectionDescription: Changemappers is not a finished product, but a continuously evolving collective creation.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: Get to know where we started, who we are, and why we believe in regenerative change.

getInvolved.title: Get Involved
getInvolved.description: Do you have skills or ideas you'd like to contribute to the community? We're waiting for you!
